name: Spicy Homemade Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric food grinder, grind the pork and bacon slices.
2. Add all of the above ingredients to the ground meat and mix thoroughly with your hands until well blended.
3. Using a meat press, shape the mixture into thin patties.
4. Wrap the patties in handi-wrap and place them on wax paper in the freezer until needed.
5. Cook the patties in a covered frypan for 20 minutes, turning them over every 5 minutes.
